sql: WITH district_counts AS (SELECT dist.district_id, dist."A2" AS district_name, dist."A3" AS region, dist."A11" AS avg_salary, dist."A12" AS unemployment_1995, dist."A13" AS unemployment_1996, COUNT(a.account_id) FILTER (WHERE a.date >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND a.date < DATE '1996-01-01') AS accounts_1995, COUNT(a.account_id) FILTER (WHERE a.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND a.date < DATE '1997-01-01') AS accounts_1996 FROM district AS dist LEFT JOIN account AS a ON a.district_id = dist.district_id AND a.date >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND a.date < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY dist.district_id, dist."A2", dist."A3", dist."A11", dist."A12", dist."A13") SELECT district_id, district_name, region, accounts_1995, accounts_1996, accounts_1996 - accounts_1995 AS account_count_delta, avg_salary, unemployment_1995, unemployment_1996, unemployment_1996 - unemployment_1995 AS unemployment_delta FROM district_counts ORDER BY account_count_delta DESC, district_id LIMIT 3;
